9e9907fdfcd2.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
9e9907fdfcd2.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
9e9907fdfcd2.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

c61ed89fd4a5.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
c61ed89fd4a5.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
c61ed89fd4a5.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

fb31da3c5897.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
fb31da3c5897.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

cbb477bbc7ab.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
cbb477bbc7ab.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
cbb477bbc7ab.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

183f4f10cc19.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
183f4f10cc19.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
183f4f10cc19.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible
